name: American Airlines
notes: Also charted as stock ticker AAL (IPO 1994-03-31) — this row uses the airline's founding date, not the IPO date. Wikidata records multiple inception (P571) dates for this entity, likely reflecting predecessor/successor entities: 1926-04-15, 1936-06-25; earliest used here. hub airport = busiest OpenFlights route origin for this carrier after excluding codeshare-marketed routes (112 non-codeshare routes in snapshot). NOTE: after codeshare exclusion, Dallas Fort Worth (DFW) and Charlotte (CLT) are TIED at 112 non-codeshare routes each in this ~2014 OpenFlights snapshot; DFW was selected as American Airlines' real-world primary/largest hub (higher passenger volume), since route-count alone cannot break the tie. Reviewer should be aware this is a judgment call, not a clean data-driven pick. OpenFlights data is a dated ~2014 snapshot; current largest hub may differ.
